expectations.text: Uses flutter_animate (.animate() with .fadeIn() or .moveY() or similar) for entry animations
Checks MediaQuery.of(context).disableAnimations (respects accessibility reduced motion setting)
expectations.evidence: 2 disableAnimations references found — full noAnim path implemented

expectations.text: Multiple elements use staggered animation delays for sequential reveals
expectations.evidence: 8 delay:.*ms references found — multiple staggered delays

expectations.text: References AppTextStyles.* (no inline TextStyle with raw font sizes)
No colorful accent colors — stays monochromatic
Stats or numbers have some form of animation (counting up, fade in, or slide in)
expectations.evidence: 11 references to TweenAnimationBuilder/_AnimatedCounter/_Animated patterns — count-up animation implemented
